regime_fall.current_status: Direct military confrontation has escalated to active hostile engagement with Trump's shoot-to-kill orders, USS George HW Bush carrier group advancing, 30+ US ships enforcing blockade with seizures including oil tanker Majestic X, while Iran responds with Strait of Hormuz closures and vessel seizures. Internal Iranian paralysis deepens with Vahidi-Ghalibaf factional conflict, inability to contact Mojtaba Khamenei, and ceasefire deadline expiration on April 22 creating succession vacuum amid economic collapse.
regime_fall.last_major_event: On April 23-24, 2026, Iran fired on and seized two cargo vessels in the Strait of Hormuz as retaliation for US blockade operations, while Trump ordered Navy shoot-to-kill rules of engagement against Iranian mine-laying boats and declared time running out for Iran negotiations, with ceasefire deadline already expired on April 22.
